title: Micron's earnings cause dilemmas in the South Korean market and trading halts
summary: Micron shares skyrocket in valuation, while South Korea activates two circuit breakers in a week, reflecting high tension in Asian markets.

title: Wall Street ends the week mixed with the S&P 500 on its worst losing streak in 10 months
summary: US indices ended almost unchanged, with the Dow Jones flat, but the Nasdaq and S&P 500 suffered declines led by the semiconductor sector.

title: Biotech sector in turmoil: potential buyouts and investment outlook
summary: The possible sale of QuidelOrtho and the recommendation of two biotech stocks with acquisition potential mark the sector's news, while analysts debate whether to rotate from chips to biotech.

title: SpaceX: joins the Nasdaq-100, its plan raises doubts, and its bonds fall
summary: SpaceX joins the Nasdaq-100 index, while its bonds plummet after a debt issuance and an analysis points out flaws in its space plan.

title: The Fed removes a key phrase from its inflation report
summary: The change in the report's language suggests a possible shift in the Federal Reserve's monetary policy.

title: Dividend showdown: NextEra Energy vs. Dominion Energy
summary: Investors compare the two utility companies to decide which offers better dividend returns.

title: SoFi shares fall more than 30% and investors evaluate options
summary: The fintech company experiences a sharp correction, prompting analysis of its future in the market.

title: US-Iran tensions impact oil price after attack on a vessel
summary: Iran and the US exchange retaliatory attacks, while crude oil falls despite the escalation in the Gulf.

title: Prediction markets under scrutiny: Polymarket investigated and Meta prepares its own app
summary: The US regulator investigates Polymarket, while Meta develops a simulated betting application.

title: Tesla increases production in Berlin and closes investigation into steering
summary: Elon Musk's company increases production by 20% at its German plant, while the safety agency concludes the investigation into steering failures.

title: Market corrects and analysts recommend three safe-haven stocks
summary: After the recent market decline, three blue-chip stocks are highlighted as buying opportunities.

title: Weak Chinese domestic demand pressures industry and attracts investors
summary: Citigroup recommends buying beaten-down Chinese tech stocks, while weak domestic consumption weighs on industrial production.

title: IMF warns of trade war and US expands restrictions on Chinese technology
summary: The IMF's chief economist warns that reciprocal protectionism threatens the global economy, while Washington bans more imports of Chinese tech products.

title: Ibex 35 ends the week with IAG and utilities rising; Indra suffers a plunge
summary: In the first half of the year, Ibex stocks show mixed performance, with a summer guide for investors.

title: Amazon invests 13 billion in India and its Prime Day reflects moderate consumption
summary: The company announces a billion-dollar investment in India, while its Prime Day event offers clues about US consumer spending.

title: Artificial intelligence dominates investments in Japan and funds in Spain
summary: Japan reveals a national AI plan involving more than 40 companies, while specialized funds emerge in Spain to invest in the sector.

title: EU and Australia tighten regulation on big tech
summary: The European Union applies control rules to Microsoft and Amazon, while Australia doubles penalties for non-compliance on social media for minors.

title: UBS and the FT anticipate a summer of uncertainty for finance
summary: The Swiss bank presents a portfolio guide for uncertain markets, while the Financial Times warns about summer volatility.

title: Apple seeks to buy memory chips from a sanctioned Chinese company
summary: The Cupertino-based company attempts to acquire semiconductors from a Chinese firm on the US blacklist.

title: Venezuela raises death toll to 920 and lowers injuries to 3,000 from the earthquakes
summary: Venezuelan authorities update casualty figures after the two earthquakes that shook the country.
